1.description: Win a battle using affinity advantage.
Win a battle with this Glyph in the front row.
Win a battle with this Glyph in the back row.
Win a battle without this Glyph being knocked out.
Capture a Glyph after a battle this Glyph participated in.

2.description: Win a battle where this Glyph is at affinity disadvantage.
Win a battle against a squad of 3 enemies.
Win a battle in 4 turns or fewer.
Win a battle where this Glyph dealt the finishing blow to 2+ enemies.

3.description: Win a battle using only this Glyph (solo).
Complete a rift floor without any Glyph being knocked out.
Win a battle against an enemy Glyph of a higher tier.
Win a battle in 3 turns or fewer.
Win a boss encounter with this Glyph in the active squad.
